content.full_text:
SUPERVISOR MAGGIE
ERICKSON
She makes a difference

October 9, 1990

California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

RE: Wedding Gifts

I am a Ventura County Supervisor and planning a wedding in the near
future. How do I handle wedding gifts? Must they be reported? If
so, on what form and is there a minimum amount? I would appreciate
information on this subject.

Sincerely,

Maggie Erickson

MAGGIE H. ERICKSON
Supervisor, Third District

MAGGIE ERICKSON FOR SUPERVISOR - 1992 - ID #890626 - 1740 Loma Drive, Camarillo, CA 93010
